subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1915-07-24 in Haifa
subcodes.first_line: First, know that this is by virtue of its connection. For example, when a particle of dust became associated with Truth, it became the point of circumambulation for all souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اولاً اینکه این بجهت نسبت است.  مثلاً نقطه[ای از] خاک منسوب بحق شد، این مطاف جمیع نفوس واقع شد
subcodes.subjects: @symbolism, @Manifestation of God as mirror, @pilgrimage [Hajj] in Islam
